stimulus:

Press any key to begin.

response: {"creativity-rating":4,"creativity-free-response":"Having to make decisions with minimal guidance beyond pointers and basic controls means a significant amount of space is available to try different things out, so it is a creative game and it allows creativity in terms of margins","originality-rating":4,"originality-free-response":"It was pretty minimal, and focused on the unique mechanics to guide the flock. I found the second level to be surprising, challenging, and difficult.
